subject: feat(map): always show search center location marker
body:
Previously, the blue dot location marker only appeared when GPS was
active. Users searching by address or using the default Johannesburg
location had no visual indicator of where results were anchored.

Now a blue dot marker is always shown at the search center — whether
the location comes from GPS, a manual address search, or the default.

Tags: map, ux, location
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: map-ux
Semver: minor
